case_title: BENLOUR CORPORATION C/O ALEX ABELA VS SHAPIRO, ALLAN W. DR.

docket_entries.description: CHECK FROM DEFENDANT FOR $1086.12 MADE OUT TO BENCOUR CORP.MAILED BACK TO DEFENDANT WITH INFO ON HOW TO PROPERLY PROCEED;
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,039.92 FILED BY BENLOUR CORPORATION C/O ALEX ABELA AS TO DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, ALLAN W. DR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-10-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, ALLAN W. DR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENLOUR CORPORATION C/O ALEX ABELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, ALLAN W. DR. $1,039.92 PRINCIPAL, $46.20 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,086.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, ALLAN W. DR.
